specs.title: verify test environment

stdout.text: Test environment verified: Frontend is ready

specs.title: ensure test data exists
pre-register test users
should display admin navigation sidebar
should display dashboard metrics
should have logout button
should navigate to Game Control page
should navigate to Traders page
should navigate to Companies page
should navigate to Trades page
should navigate to Orders page
should navigate to Orderbook page
should navigate to Diagnostics page
should logout admin and redirect to login
should display market status
should display market toggle button
should display initialize game button
should toggle market status
should have init game functionality
should display volatility controls

annotations.description: Volatility controls not present on this page
Volatility controls not present on this page

specs.title: closed market should prevent order placement
market status should sync across all connected clients
should display list of traders
should display trader information
should have action buttons for traders
should filter traders by search
banned trader should not be able to login
banned trader should be disconnected
muted trader should not be able to send chat messages
should display trade history
should have pagination for trades
should display open orders
should display order book for selected symbol
should allow selecting different symbols
should display list of companies
should have create company functionality
should display system diagnostics
should render login form with all elements
should switch between trader and admin tabs
should show different placeholders for trader vs admin
should show validation error for empty registration number
should show validation error for empty password
should show validation error for short registration number
should show validation error for short password
should login successfully with valid credentials
should show error for invalid password
should show error for non-existent user
should store session token after successful login
should receive initial data after login
should login successfully as admin with valid credentials
should show error for invalid admin password
should show error for non-existent admin username
should navigate to register page
should redirect authenticated trader to trade page
should render registration form with all elements
should have correct placeholders
should require registration number
should require display name
should require password
should validate minimum registration number length
should validate minimum name length
should validate minimum password length
should detect password mismatch
should register new user successfully
should show error for duplicate registration number
should receive session token after registration
should receive initial portfolio allocation after registration
should display welcome message after registration
should navigate to login page
should redirect authenticated user to trade page
should reject order when insufficient cash
should reject sell order when insufficient shares
should reject short order when insufficient margin
should not submit order with zero quantity
should not submit order with negative quantity
should not submit order with zero price
should not submit order with negative price
should handle cancellation of non-existent order gracefully
should reject market order with no liquidity
should handle expired session token
should handle logout during active session
should kick old session when new login occurs
should show loading state while fetching data
should handle empty order book gracefully
should handle empty open orders gracefully
